market_context: U.S. stock futures are flat as the S&P 500 approaches its all-time high of 7,002.28, reached on January 28. Investors are monitoring upcoming earnings reports from major banks and geopolitical developments in the Middle East.

predictions.reasoning: With the S&P 500 nearing its all-time high and positive investor sentiment, SPY is likely to experience upward momentum today.
Microsoft's strong market position and recent positive performance suggest a continued upward trend in its stock price.
